_publications._publicationTitle: HuR/ELAVL1 drives malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor growth and metastasis.

_contextSnippet: Remarkably, induction of HuR shRNA by doxycycline treatment severely blunted tumor growth, and even led to visible tumor regression...on average tumors shrank by 40%
details: Induction of HuR shRNA by doxycycline treatment severely blunted tumor growth and led to visible tumor regression with 40% average tumor shrinkage
